  "findings": [
    "Missing bonding jumper around the water meter, creating a potential break in the electrical grounding path."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriately sized copper bonding jumper around the water meter using approved ground clamps."
  ],
  "rationale": "Per NEC 250.104, bonding must be continuous around removable equipment such as water meters to ensure a reliable ground-fault current path and prevent shock hazards if the meter is removed.",

    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
